sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (id UInt32, interval_data Interval Year);
INSERT INTO test_intervals VALUES (1, INTERVAL 2 YEAR);
SELECT addInterval(INTERVAL 2 DAY, INTERVAL 3 DAY) AS result;
UPDATE test_intervals SET interval_data = addInterval(interval_data, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, addInterval(interval_data, INTERVAL 5 DAY) AS new_interval FROM test_intervals;
